data.title: US Dollar Faces Continued Pressure Amid Political and Economic Concerns
data.description: The US dollar, after stabilizing from multi-year lows, continues to face vulnerabilities due to persistent downside risks. According to NS3.AI, negative sentiment is driven by former President Trump's remarks suggesting a tolerance for a weaker dollar and apprehensions about a potentially more dovish Federal Reserve Chair nomination. Additional political risks, such as the possibility of a US government shutdown, further exacerbate the situation. Markets are now closely watching the Federal Reserve's forward guidance, which could result in further depreciation of the dollar.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Spot ETF Investors Face Challenges Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
On January 28, the average entry price for U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF investors is approximately $86,000. According to BlockBeats, the market is fluctuating near this entry price, posing a test of "conviction" for investors. They must decide whether to continue holding their positions or take profits to avoid potential losses. CryptoQuant analyst Moreno notes that historically, entry price ranges serve as psychological pivots. Prices above this range boost investor confidence and stabilize fund flows, while sustained prices below accelerate redemptions due to diminished profit buffers.

Since October last year, the holdings of U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs have decreased by 8.4%, with cumulative inflows dropping from around $72.6 billion to approximately $66.5 billion. The ETF's performance in the latter half of January has been poor, with net outflows on six out of seven trading days, and only a modest net inflow of $6.8 million on January 26.

data.title: Oracle says data center outage caused US TikTok issues amid censorship claims
data.description:
Problems affecting TikTok users across the United States stem from weather damage at a data storage facility run by Oracle, the company stated Tuesday. The explanation comes amid allegations from California’s top official that the platform is blocking posts critical of President Donald Trump. Michael Egbert, speaking for Oracle, confirmed that one of the company’s […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracle-data-center-outage-us-tiktok-issues/

data.title: Jefferies: Tether's gold holdings have appreciated by over $5 billion
data.description: According to estimates by Jefferies based on data disclosed by Tether, as of the end of September, Tether held approximately 116 tons of gold, worth about $14.4 billion at the time. Gold was priced at $3,858 per ounce at the end of September last year, but has since surged to over $5,200, driven by rising geopolitical uncertainty and investors flocking to safe-haven assets. This means Tether has realized an appreciation of over $5 billion on this portion of its holdings.

data.title: Analysts: A dovish signal from the Federal Reserve could trigger a new round of dollar sell-off.
data.description: FXEM analyst Abdelaziz Albogdady stated that while the US dollar has stabilized after falling to multi-year lows, it still faces continued downside risks. The dollar's weakness is primarily due to Trump's comments signaling tolerance for currency depreciation. Markets are also increasingly concerned that Trump might nominate a more dovish Federal Reserve chair, potentially implying looser monetary policy and reduced institutional independence. Coupled with widespread unease about domestic political risks in the US (especially the rising possibility of a government shutdown), the dollar remains under pressure. With the market largely pricing in the Fed holding rates steady, the focus has shifted entirely to forward guidance. Any dovish leanings could exacerbate downward pressure on the dollar and US Treasury yields. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Founder Zhao Changpeng Reports Coordinated Online Attacks
data.description: Foresight News posted on X (formerly Twitter). Binance founder Zhao Changpeng, known as @cz_binance, has reported experiencing organized online attacks. He noted that several unfamiliar accounts have been posting highly similar content in a short period, suggesting a pattern of copying and amplification. This behavior appears to be more systematic rather than a natural discussion. The related topics continue to circulate within the community.

data.title: Ethereum Researcher Proposes Anti-Censorship Feature for 2026 Upgrade
data.description:
Ethereum researcher Thomas Thiery, also known as soispoke, has proposed the inclusion of FOCIL as a core anti-censorship feature in the upcoming Hegota upgrade. According to BlockBeats, Hegota is Ethereum's second major upgrade scheduled for the latter half of 2026. FOCIL is a protocol layer mechanism that modifies Ethereum's fork choice rules, enforcing the inclusion of any valid transaction into on-chain blocks within a limited timeframe. This mechanism allows multiple validators to collectively enforce transaction inclusion, rather than relying on a single block builder.

The primary aim of this proposal is to reduce Ethereum's dependency on centralized validators, thereby mitigating potential risks of large-scale transaction censorship in the future. This enhancement is intended to bolster Ethereum's core value as a neutral and censorship-resistant blockchain. Thiery emphasized that without FOCIL, the protocol could be vulnerable to significant censorship events. He advocates for Ethereum to proactively design long-term resilience instead of passively responding to sudden censorship challenges.

data.title: XRP Market Dynamics: Large Whales Sell, Smaller Whales Absorb
data.description:
Over the past month, large XRP whales have sold around 400 million tokens, valued at $800 million, contributing to increased market distribution pressure. According to NS3.AI, smaller whales have absorbed a significant portion of this supply, which has helped limit bearish momentum. Meanwhile, long-term holders continue to accumulate tokens, reflecting sustained confidence in the asset.

From a technical perspective, XRP has recently broken out of a descending wedge pattern, indicating a potential 11.7% price increase toward $2.10. However, the cryptocurrency remains vulnerable if it falls below critical support levels.

data.title: Mirae Asset Global Investments Expands Stake in MicroStrategy
data.description: Mirae Asset Global Investments has expanded its stake in MicroStrategy by purchasing 87,531 shares valued at $14.1 million. According to NS3.AI, MicroStrategy is recognized for its substantial Bitcoin holdings, which form a key part of its corporate strategy. Mirae Asset's significant investment reflects increasing institutional confidence in assets linked to Bitcoin.

data.title: Forbes Interview with Gate Founder Dr. Han: Building Long-Term Competitiveness for Crypto Platforms Through Transparency and Compliance
data.description: According to a recent Forbes feature article, Gate founder and CEO Dr. Han systematically reviewed his entrepreneurial journey in an interview and elaborated on Gate's core development philosophy of security, transparency, and long-termism. The report points out that Gate was one of the first trading platforms in the industry to introduce and continuously disclose proof of reserves. Through higher standards of asset security mechanisms and a robust risk control system, it has gradually built a foundation of trust among nearly 50 million users. In terms of compliance, Gate actively responds to global regulatory frameworks, including MiCA, and multiple entities under its umbrella have obtained or completed relevant regulatory registrations, license applications, authorizations, or approvals in jurisdictions such as Malta, the Bahamas, Australia, and Dubai. Dr. Han stated that the crypto industry is entering a critical regulatory cycle, and platforms with true long-term competitiveness must withstand the dual scrutiny of the market and regulators. Gate is also continuously lowering the barriers for users to enter the world of digital assets and tokenized finance through an integrated approach to trading, custody, settlement, and compliance capabilities, driving the industry towards a more robust and sustainable future.

data.title: Bitget appoints MotoGP champion Jorge Lorenzo as UEX Eco Safety Ambassador
data.description: On International Data Privacy Day, Bitget officially announced the appointment of MotoGP champion Jorge Lorenzo as its Security Ambassador. To mark this occasion, the two companies launched a five-module security education video series, systematically explaining phishing attacks, two-factor authentication, risk warnings, and core mechanisms such as Bitget's Protection Fund and Certificate of Reserve. The series uses Lorenzo's signature "X-Fuera" racing perspective as a starting point to illustrate how a broader perspective and access to information within the UEX (Unique Horizons Exchange) ecosystem can enhance the security and rationality of trading decisions. This security education content also integrates with Bitget's Anti-Fraud Center. Launched in June 2025, the center continuously provides users with real-time fraud warnings and security tools. Currently, Bitget maintains a protection fund exceeding $300 million and consistently releases Merkel Tree Certificates of Reserve monthly to ensure users' assets are fully backed 1:1. Jorge Lorenzo stated that both motorsport and the digital asset industry require a precise balance between speed and security; Bitget CEO Gracy Chen also pointed out that he hopes this collaboration will further enhance users' proactive awareness of digital asset security and promote continuous progress in the industry in terms of transparency and security standards.

data.title: JustLend DAO TVL surpasses $6.71 billion mark
data.description: According to official news, JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, has surpassed $6.71 billion in total value locked (TVL) and has over 480,000 users in its latest weekly report. As a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO is demonstrating the vibrant energy of the DeFi market with its strong performance, providing efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: JustLend DAO Reports Significant Growth in Total Value Locked
data.description: The latest weekly report from JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, reveals that the platform's total value locked has surpassed $6.71 billion, with user numbers exceeding 480,000. According to ChainCatcher, JustLend DAO serves as a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, showcasing robust growth and vitality in the DeFi market. The platform continues to offer efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: GamePad, an AI-native intelligent DeFi infrastructure, is about to launch its mainnet.
data.description: GamePad, an AI-native DeFi infrastructure, is reportedly launching its mainnet in Q1 2026. It will open early access channels globally, providing community members from different countries and regions with opportunities to enter the ecosystem and participate in network operation verification. Currently, GamePad has established strategic partnerships with several industry institutions, advancing preparations for the mainnet launch through technical integration and ecosystem collaboration. Related assets will gradually enter the circulation and application phases according to the established plan. Simultaneously, the project has deployed a system-level operational support mechanism to ensure the stability of liquidity scheduling and risk management in long-term operation scenarios, providing support for price discovery and basic liquidity formation during the mainnet operation phase. GamePad is an AI-native infrastructure built for the long-term operation of decentralized finance, adopting an AI-Native architecture design. It incorporates a built-in computing power scheduling system and an Agent continuous operation engine to serve the continuous operation needs of on-chain transaction execution, risk calculation, and intelligent strategies. Previously, the project has received investment from institutions including OKX and Enjin.

data.title: An address has placed a bet of nearly $100,000 on California passing a one-time wealth tax for billionaires in the 2026 election.
data.description: According to The Poly Nerd, a new address (drop126) invested $99,954 to buy the "YES" option in the Polymarket prediction market for "California will pass a one-time wealth tax for billionaires in the 2026 election," at a price of $0.45. If the prediction is accurate, the address will receive $222,120, making a profit of $122,166.
